title: ReportsPlus
description: This is a simple report system for your Minecraft Server!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb4c0b19ad5de1f7bb4d9539fa91fa03b94b7330.png)
## About ReportsPlus
ReportsPlus is a Minecraft plugin that helps players and server staff keep the game fun and safe. With this plugin, players can report other players who are not following the rules, and the staff can look at all the reports to see what's going on.

## What Can You Do with ReportsPlus?
1. **Report a Player** - If someone is breaking the rules, like being cheating, you can report them. You just type: /report <player> <reason>.
For example, if someone is cheating, you can type: /report Steve Cheating.
2. **See All Reports** - The server staff can see all the reports that players send.
They can open a special menu and see who got reported, why, and when it happened.
This helps the staff decide what to do, like giving warnings or banning players who keep breaking the rules.\
![reports](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/945de13d537c87588e32319923c4f47a15dcd927.png)

3. **Track the Reports** - Staff can check the reports in a list. They can look at them by page if there are a lot of reports.
They can even open menus to handle reports one by one.
![report](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42a109509c8f91c76472522a3f18ee865edf0d66.png)

4. **Clear Reports** - Staff can easily clear reports by running the command: /reports clear OR clicking the in-game item.\
![clear reports](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb99dc27c61683837a4e69462d389540bdb16645.png)

5. **Active Owner** - This project is still being worked on, there are many things I, RedBlackFlamez, would like to add to this!


## Support
If you have any questions, bugs, or any other type of support, feel free to join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/ZnfNDDbnPW)!
